events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering the iconic British singer-songwriter, George Michael, who was born on June 25, 1963.

angles.name: Musical Legacy
angles.copy: Thirty-nine years since 'Careless Whisper' hit the charts, we're celebrating the enduring artistry of George Michael. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Pop, Michael Jackson, who passed away on June 25, 2009, at the age of 50.

angles.name: King of Pop Tribute
angles.copy: Fifteen years ago today, we lost the incomparable Michael Jackson. His music continues to move generations. Which of his hits define your playlist?

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: Happy 86th birthday to the legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, born on July 7, 1940.

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! From the Cavern to global superstardom, what's your favourite Ringo moment?

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Celebrating the 79th birthday of Queen's legendary guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! His guitar riffs with Queen are simply out of this world. What's your favourite Queen track featuring his legendary Red Special?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: Wishing a very happy 83rd birthday to The Rolling Stones' legendary frontman, Sir Mick Jagger, born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Icon
angles.copy: Still got the moves! Happy 83rd birthday to the incredible Mick Jagger. Six decades of rock and still going strong. What's your top Rolling Stones anthem?

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: On August 1, 1981, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its very first music video, changing the music landscape forever.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: Remember the day music changed forever? Back in '81, MTV launched with 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star, or just give us more to love?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' released
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, becoming one of the fastest-selling debut albums in UK chart history.

angles.name: Britpop Masterpiece
angles.copy: Twenty-nine years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed British music forever. What's your favourite track from this absolute classic?

events.title: Woodstock Festival anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, bringing together nearly half a million people for '3 Days of Peace & Music'.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, the Woodstock Festival began its legendary run. An iconic moment in music history – if you could have been there, who would you have wanted to see?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the King of Rock 'n' Roll, Elvis Presley, who passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Long Live The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we lost Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to inspire. What's your all-time favourite Elvis track?

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Remembering influential rapper Tupac Shakur, who was shot on September 7, 1996, in Las Vegas and tragically passed away six days later on September 13, at the age of 25.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Legend
angles.copy: Thirty years ago, the music world lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur's profound impact on hip-hop and culture. What's his most powerful lyric to you?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Remembering the revolutionary guitarist Jimi Hendrix, who passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Guitar Genius
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago, we lost the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix. His innovative guitar work changed music forever. What's the Hendrix track that still blows your mind?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' released
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic 'Abbey Road' album in the UK on September 26, 1969, featuring that legendary zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those songs – pure magic. What's your favourite track from their final recorded masterpiece?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Happy 75th birthday to the formidable Chrissie Hynde, lead singer and founder of The Pretenders, born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Matriarch
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 75th birthday to the incredible Chrissie Hynde! A true rock trailblazer with The Pretenders. What's your favourite song from her amazing career?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Happy 54th birthday to the unmistakable voice of Oasis and Britpop icon, Liam Gallagher, born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: You know the voice! Happy 54th birthday to Liam Gallagher. From Oasis anthems to solo hits, what's your favourite track featuring his iconic vocals?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' anniversary
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic album 'Imagine' was released in 1971, with the US single following on October 11, 1971. The single was released in the UK in 1975.

angles.name: Timeless Anthem
angles.copy: Fifty-five years since John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace. What does 'Imagine' mean to you?

events.title: Apple released the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising how we listen to music with '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

angles.name: Music In Your Pocket
angles.copy: Remember when the first iPod dropped? It changed everything for music lovers. What was the first album you loaded onto yours?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the anniversary of the world premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! We're celebrating the world's most famous spy. Who's your favourite Bond and what's the best Bond theme tune of all time?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Remembering the legendary John Lennon, who was born on October 9, 1940, and would have been 86 today.

angles.name: Lennon's Legacy
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we're celebrating the enduring genius of John Lennon. His music still inspires, decades on. What's your favourite Lennon song?
